result.Description__c: Brighten • Refresh • Even Skin Tone~signature~Gently revitalizes tired, lackluster skin for a fresh and healthy glow. Improves overall clarity and smoothness, leaving the complexion bright and refreshed.

Soothing Hydration • Energy Boost • Detox~signature~Gently replenishes dry skin with soothing hydration to leave it feeling soft, smooth, and refreshed. This treatment helps restore balance and comfort while giving the skin a healthy, natural glow - perfect for everyday care or a quick pick-me-up.

Deep Cleansing • Balance • Renew~signature~Thoroughly cleanses and detoxifies to clear congestion and refine pores. Leaves the skin feeling clean, balanced, and refreshed with a smooth, healthy-looking finish.

Soothing • Strengthening • Restorative~signature~A calming facial designed for delicate, easily irritated skin. Gently cleanses and hydrates while reducing redness and strengthening the skin’s natural barrier. Infused with soothing botanicals and anti-inflammatory ingredients to leave the complexion soft, balanced, and comforted.

injections.

Anti-Inflammatory • Calming • Strengthens Barrier~luxury@acne control facial treatment~Targets redness, irritation, and skin sensitivity with gentle, soothing ingredients. Strengthens the skin’s natural defenses and restores comfort, making it ideal for rosacea-prone or post-treatment skin.

Purifying • Oil Control • Clear Pores~luxury@acne control facial treatment~Harnesses the power of marine botanical to draw out toxins, regulate sebum, and clear congested pores. Helps reduce breakouts, blackheads, and inflammation while restoring skin clarity.

Elasticity • Firming • Skin Renewal~luxury@anti-age facial treatment~This anti-aging facial uses tri-peptides and collagen-boosting actives to stimulate skin regeneration, improve firmness, and enhance resilience. Especially suitable for mature or sagging
skin.

Whitening • Radiance • Clarity~luxury@brightening facial treatment~Enriched with stabilized vitamin C, this facial targets dullness and uneven skin tone. It helps to brighten, lighten pigmentation, and leave the skin looking luminous, refreshed, and clear.

Purifying • Renew • Collagen-stimulating~advanced~A renewing facial that uses professional-grade exfoliating acids to smooth uneven tone, refine pores, and restore clarity. Leaves the skin soft, bright, and refreshed with a luminous, youthful glow.

remove dull surface cells. Improves texture, softens fine lines, and enhances product absorption,
revealing a smoother, more radiant complexion with minimal downtime.

tone. This needle-free innovation creates microscopic channels to stimulate regeneration
